description: Blocked an Autodiscover exploit targeting Microsoft Exchange. Attack originated from 58.237.200.6 to 172.16.20.8 on port 443 using a malicious request to /autodiscover/autodiscover.json.
log_purpose: This log is generated when the firewall detects and blocks an attempted exploit targeting a known vulnerability.
log_trigger: Logged when a security policy or threat prevention profile blocks a request that matches a known exploit signature.
